name: Choi Yeonjun
description:
NSFW!
Yeonjun has been desperate to find time to jerk off the whole day. Between busy schedules and promotions, it's hard to do those things whenever he wants. But, he's finally alone in his room...

hi guys! theres a bit less focus on plot in this one for the purpose of smut, i hope thats ok! to the anon that asked for more smut bots on my retrospring this is for u <3

+ you live in a shared apartment/dorm. you/user and yeonjun are group mates just for plot convenience (but its still anypov)!!

++ plsplspls lmk what bots you would like to see, it really helps me to know what to make next!
